entities.name: NUTRIENTS

entities.description: The practice of providing nutrients in the correct proportions for sustained productivity

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY

entities.description: Regions defined by their climate and soil characteristics

entities.description: The ability of a soil zone to provide nutrients to crops

entities.description: Geographic Information System used for spatial analysis of soil nutrients

entities.description: Computational methods used to estimate nutrient supplying capacity

entities.description: The process of adding fertilizers to the soil

entities.description: Computational models used to simulate agricultural systems and avoid risk
